speaker: note
english: A '+' indicates where the people typically cross themselves.
slavonic: '+' Oznacha vreme kada treba da se krstimo.

speaker: Priest
english: + Blessed is the kingdom of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Spirit, now and ever, and unto ages of ages.
slavonic: + Blagosloveno tsarstvo Otsa i Sina i Svyatago Duha, ninye i prisno i vo vyeko vyekov.

speaker: People
english: Amen.

speaker: Priest
english: In peace let us pray to the Lord.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For the peace from above and the salvation of our souls, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O svishnyem mirye, i spaseniyi dush nashih, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For the peace of the whole world, for the good estate of the Holy Churches of God, and for the union of all, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O mirye vsego mira, blagostoyaniyi svyatih Bozhiyih tserkvey vsyeh, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For this Holy House and for those that enter it with faith, reverence and the fear of God, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O svyatyem hramye sem, i s'vyeroyu, blagogovyeniem i strahom Bozhiyim vhodyaschchih von, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For our Most Holy Patriarch [NAME], and for our Bishop [NAME], for the venerable priesthood, for the diaconate in Christ, for all the clergy and the people, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O Svyatyeyshem Patriyarsye nashem [IME] i o Episkopye nashem [IME], chestnyem presviterstvye, vo Hristye diakonstvye, o vsem pritchtye i lyudeh, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For the honorable and God-protected president of this country, for the government and Christ-loving armed forces, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O chestnyem i Bogohranimon prezidentye i pravitelystvye strani seya i vsem voinstvye nasem, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: To enable them to subdue every enemy and adversary, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O posobiti i pokoriti pod nozye ih vsyakago vraga i supostata, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For this city, for every city and countryside, and for the faithful that dwell in them, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O gradye sem, vsyakom gradye, stranye, i vyeroyu zhivushchih v'nih, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For seasonable weather, for abundance of the fruits of the earth, and for peaceful times, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O blagorastvoreniyi vozduhov, o izobiliyi plodov zemnih i vremenyeh mirnih, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: For travelers by sea, by land, by air; for the sick and the suffering; for captives and their salvation, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O plavayushchih, puteshestvuyushchih, neduguyushchih, strazhdushchih, plyenennih, i o spaseniyi ih, Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: for our deliverance from all tribulation, wrath and want, let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: O izbavitisya nam ot vsyakiya skorbi gnyeva i nuzhdi Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: Protect us, save us, help us, have mercy on us, and safeguard us, O God, by Thy grace.
slavonic: Zastupi, spasi, pomiluy i sohrani nas, Bozhe, Tvoyeyu blagodatiyu.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: + Commemorating our most holy, most pure, most blessed and glorious lady, the mother of God and ever-virgin Mary, with all the saints, let us comment ourselves and one another, and our whole life unto Christ our God.
slavonic: + Presvyatuyu, prechistuyu, preblagoslovennuyu slavnuyu vladichitsu nashu Bogoroditsu i prisnodyevu Mariyu, so vsyemi svyatimi pomyanuvshe, sami sebe, i drug druga, i ves zhivot nash Hristu Bogu predadim.

speaker: People
english: To Thee, O Lord.

speaker: rubric
english: The Priest quietly says the prayer of the First Antiphon: 'O Lord our God, Whose power is ineffable...'

speaker: Priest
english: + For unto Thee are due the glory, honor, and worship, to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit, now and ever, and unto ages of ages.
slavonic: + Yako podobaet Tebye vsyakaya slava, chest i poklonenie, Otsu, i Sinu, i Svyatomu Duhu, ninye i prisno i vo vyeki vyekov.

speaker: People
english: Amen.

speaker: note
english: Varies on Feast Days

speaker: People
english: + Glory to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit: now and ever, and unto ages of ages, amen. Bless the Lord o my soul: and all that is within me bless His holy name: Blessed art Thou, O Lord.
slavonic: + Slava Otcu i Sinu i Svyatomu Duhu, i ninje i prisno i vo vyeki vyekov, amin. Blagoslovi dushe moya Gospoda, i vsya vnutrenyaya moya Imya Svyatoye Yego: Blagosloven yesi, Gospodi.

speaker: Priest
english: Again and again in peace let us pray to the Lord.
slavonic: Paki i paki mirom Gospodu pomolimsya.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: Protect us, save us, help us, have mercy on us, and safeguard us, O God, by Thy Grace.
slavonic: Zastupi, spasi, pomiluy i sohrani nas, Bozhe, Tvoyeyu blagodatiyu.

speaker: People
english: Lord, have mercy.

speaker: Priest
english: + Commemorating our most holy, most pure, most blessed and glorious lady, the mother of God and ever-virgin Mary, with all the saints, let us comment ourselves and one another, and our whole life unto Christ our God.
slavonic: + Presvyatuyu, prechistuyu, preblagoslovennuyu slavnuyu vladichitsu nashu Bogoroditsu i prisnodyevu Mariyu, so vsyemi svyatimi pomyanuvshe, sami sebe, i drug druga, i ves zhivot nash Hristu Bogu predadim.

speaker: People
english: To Thee, O Lord.

speaker: rubric
english: The Priest quietly says the prayer of the Second Antiphon: 'O Lord our God, save Thy people...'

speaker: Priest
english: + For unto Thee are due the glory, honor, and worship, to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit, now and ever, and unto ages of ages.
slavonic: + Yako podobaet Tebye vsyakaya slava, chest i poklonenie, Otsu, i Sinu, i Svyatomu Duhu, ninye i prisno i vo vyeki vyekov.

speaker: People
english: Amen.
